docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-07-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CRAWFORD, PHILIP
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-18-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-18-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEWSON, RUTH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CRAWFORD, PHILIP (THE COURT DETERMINES THAT DEFENDANT WAS ACTING WITHIN THE COURSE OF HIS EMPLOYMENT AT THE TIME OF THE INCIDENT, AND THAT THE EVIDENCE DID NOT ESTABLISH A BASIS FOR INDIVIDUAL LIABILITY.) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-22-2008 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO SEP-18-2008 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT CRAWFORD, PHILIP
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY DEWSON, RUTH AS TO DEFENDANT CRAWFORD, PHILIP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-22-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-18-2008 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, 506)
